leadText: Curry Powder (Japanese: カレーパウダー Curry Powder) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A very spicy condiment. Just watch out—use too much of this potent seasoning, and it'll cancel out the other flavors.
